ip_outcome_note: Card name confirms Wasabi from Disney's Big Hero 6 (2014), adapted from Marvel Comics. Disney Wiki and Big Hero 6 Wiki document his plasma blade weapons, OCD organizational traits, and role as the team's risk-averse applied physics specialist. External Disney/Marvel IP — IP warning block added.

trivia_bullets.text: Wasabi is an applied physics student at the San Fransokyo Institute of Technology in Disney's Big Hero 6 (2014), adapted from the Marvel Comics property. Neurotic and risk-averse, he exhibits OCD-adjacent organizational tendencies. His suit's weapons are retractable plasma blades sharp enough to slice through nearly any material.

Reign of Jafar (Lorcana Set 8, released May 30, 2025) brings Big Hero 6 characters into Lorcana. Wasabi appears as a Sapphire-ink card — Sapphire represents wisdom, logic, and preparation in Lorcana, a fitting ink color for a character defined by meticulous readiness.
sources: LorcanaPlayer.com: Big Hero 6 Lorcana cards list

trivia_bullets.text: "Okay, so the plan is 'Leave Wasabi to watch our backs while we steal the crown.' Good to know." Captures Wasabi's dry sarcasm; in the film he voices reservations about dangerous plans while still executing them.

5-cost Sapphire Character (Storyborn Hero, Common), 3 Strength / 5 Willpower / 2 Lore with Support keyword. High Willpower relative to Strength reflects his defensive guardian role. Support is a Sapphire-ink staple keyword.

related_cards.name: Hiro Hamada
related_cards.note: Big Hero 6 team leader; likely paired in franchise builds

related_cards.name: GoGo Tomago
related_cards.note: Big Hero 6 team member; complement to Wasabi in team builds
